root.speaker: Quick-Launch Apprentice
root.text:
Oh, hello! You look like you came in from outside.
Need a quick jump anywhere? I keep the shortcuts.

choices.label: Where do I drop things off?

shops.speaker: Quick-Launch Apprentice
shops.text:
Binds, in the Sprawl. That's `/usr/bin` — every named
tool-spirit you'll ever want stocks a stall there. Apt,
Pacman, Tar. They sell `+x` bits.

drops.speaker: Quick-Launch Apprentice
drops.text:
Downloads, next door. Tem is in charge. She has not yet
looked at any of it.

root.speaker: Reminder Sticky-Note
root.text:
PICK UP MILK. PICK UP MILK. PICK UP MILK.
...oh. Hello.

job.speaker: Reminder Sticky-Note
job.text:
I am the day's reminder. One line, repeated until it is
either done or forgotten. Today's line: pick up milk.

whose.speaker: Reminder Sticky-Note
whose.text: I have never asked. That is not in my job description.

props.message:
Desktop —

What's in front of you, not what's filed away.

A long low table dominates the room.

Tools sit on it where someone put them down: a kettle, a
ledger, a half-folded letter, a key with no chain.

Trash can sits in the corner, full.

Nobody empties it. Nobody asks who should.

A glass of water, half-drunk.

It has been here since this morning. Perhaps yesterday morning.
